title: SourceDef
description: A single data-driven manga source. A source is DATA, not code: {engine, domain, config}. A clean Play-Store build ships only the generic bundled engines (madara, mangareader, ...) with ZERO source domains baked in; each SourceDef arrives at runtime from a user-added repo URL. No JavaScript, no downloaded code, no APK extensions. The `config` object is engine-specific and selected by the `engine` discriminator.

id.description: Stable unique source id within the repo (e.g. "hiperdex"). Used as the Nyora MangaSource key and to namespace String manga/chapter ids.

name.description: Human-readable source title shown in the UI (e.g. "HiperDex").

lang.description: Primary content language as a BCP-47 / ISO-639-1 code ("en","id","pt","ja", "all" for multi-language). Distinct from config.locale, which governs date parsing/title-casing.

nsfw.description: Whether the source is predominantly adult. Mirrors kotatsu isNsfwSource (ContentType.HENTAI). Drives contentRating = ADULT at the source level.

contentType.description: Dominant content type of the source. Mirrors kotatsu ContentType enum.

engine.description: Which bundled generic engine renders this source. Acts as the discriminator selecting the shape of `config`. Only `madara` and `mangareader` have a typed `config` schema (see allOf below); every other engine reads its pure-data config from the free-form `config` object (the Kotlin SourceDef.rawConfig escape hatch).

domain.description: Primary host, without scheme (e.g. "hiperdex.com"). All URLs are built as https://{domain}/... . User-overridable at runtime.

config.description: Engine-specific pure-data configuration. Shape determined by `engine` (see allOf discriminator below).

broken.description: Source is disabled everywhere: dead upstream, no bundled engine, or @Broken in kotatsu. Loaders on ALL platforms hide it.

brokenReason.description: Optional human note for why `broken` is true (e.g. "dead DNS, no successor").

antiBot.description: Anti-bot protection guarding the site. When set, the source needs a solver the platform may not have. PLATFORM POLICY: native builds that run a local helper capable of solving/forwarding the challenge (desktop, nyora-mihon, android, docker) LOAD these sources; thin clients that hit a shared read-only helper or scrape in-browser (web, ios, aidoku-extension) HIDE any source with antiBot set. Absent = no anti-bot (loads everywhere).

cfWall.description: When antiBot=cloudflare, which Cloudflare wall (measured 2026-07 via curl_cffi Chrome impersonation). "A" = fingerprint-only 403, cleared at ZERO per-request load by TLS/JA3 impersonation (impersonator-okhttp) — recoverable everywhere once the helper impersonates. "B" = JS interstitial ("Just a moment", cf_chl), needs a one-time headless cf_clearance solve. See CF_BYPASS.md.

pageSize.description: Items per browse page (kotatsu PagedMangaParser pageSize; used by offset-based paginators / API-limit engines).

staticTag.description: A pre-baked tag, used when live tag discovery fails on that theme layout.

key.description: Tag identifier / slug used in filter URLs.

filterCapabilities.description: Booleans for the filter UI. Mirrors kotatsu MangaListFilterCapabilities.

madaraPageMode.description: Pagination placement for madara pathBrowse: PATH=/page/{n}/, QUERY=?page={n}, SUFFIX=/{n}, NONE=no paging.

madaraTagSource.description: One tag-discovery scrape recipe for madara tagDiscovery. Absorbs the fetchAvailableTags overrides that only move the tag list to a different URL / element shape.

mode.description: Extraction shape: ANCHOR=<a> (key from href/tagPrefix, title from ownText), CHECKBOX=filter-form input (key from input[value], title from <label>/nextElementSibling), OPTION=<select><option> (key from value, title from option text).

url.description: GET path for the tag page. Omitted => "/{listUrl}". "" = site root. Accepts query paths, e.g. "?s=&post_type=wp-manga".

selector.description: ANCHOR => <a> elements; CHECKBOX => wrapper or <input>; OPTION => <option> elements.

keyPrefix.description: Prepended to each derived key (Roseveil dual <select> genre_/tag_).

madaraPathBrowse.description: Separate-search + path-based genre/catalog browse strategy (absorbs the getListPage overrides that add a dedicated search endpoint and browse genres/catalog by URL path). Present => replaces the base admin-ajax / flat-merged-GET listing. Absent => base behavior. A bare {} reproduces the ManyToon canonical form. {tagPrefix} and {listUrl} interpolate the top-level config fields.

searchUrl.description: Text-search URL template. Tokens: {q}=urlEncoded query, {page}=page number.

searchPageMode.description: How the page number renders in the search branch when {page} is not templated into searchUrl.

sortParam.description: Query key carrying the sort token in browse; null => path/none only.

sortMap.description: SortOrder -> browse sort token. default {POPULARITY:views, UPDATED:latest, NEWEST:new-manga, ALPHABETICAL:alphabet, RATING:rating}. Values may be numeric-string tokens or path tokens (used with a {sort} placeholder).

container.description: List-item container selector; null => stock parseMangaList containers. Field sub-selectors (summary/title/cover/rating/tags) stay stock.

madaraChapterFetch.description: Full chapter-list fetch descriptor (absorbs loadChapters overrides incl. GET endpoints + pagination loops). Present => supersedes postReq/postDataReq. Absent => base postReq/postDataReq behavior. Row parsing stays on the existing selectors.chapter/date knobs.

body.description: POST body template; null => empty form. Same tokens as url.

idSelector.description: Element whose data-id attribute supplies {mangaId} (e.g. "div[id^=manga-chapters-holder]" prefix match).

paginated.description: Loop {page}=1,2,... until an empty page, then renumber ascending.

headers.description: Optional static request headers (e.g. X-Requested-With); kept for fidelity.

madaraListItem.description: Alternate list-item markup for parseMangaList (absorbs the overrides with a different card container / field sub-selectors). Absent => stock parseMangaList verbatim. Every sub-field falls back to its stock selector; rating/tags/author/state keep stock selectors.

container.description: Card container. default div.row.c-tabs-item__content ifEmpty div.page-item-detail.

title.description: Title element. default the stock h3,h4 / .manga-name,.post-title chain.

coverResizeStrip.description: Regex removed from the resolved cover URL (strip a resize suffix like -193x278 or -\d+x\d+).

fallbackToStock.description: If the configured container yields nothing, retry the stock parseMangaList body (Roseveil).

mangaReaderChapters.description: Chapter-row parse tuning for getDetails (absorbs the getDetails overrides whose only new logic is the chapter-row parse). Absent/all-default => stock MangaThemesia row parse. Localized relative dates are handled by the existing relativeDateWords field.

order.description: Row ordering: DOM_REVERSED=reverse DOM so oldest=1 (base), DOM=rows already oldest-first, BY_NUMBER=sort by parsed chapter number.

anchor.description: Selector for the row <a>. Omitted => selectFirst("a"). "." or "self" => the row element itself IS the anchor.

titleSelector.description: Chapter title element (e.g. h2, td.judulseries a, span.lchx > a).

titleFallback.description: Title fallback when titleSelector is empty: CHAPTER_INDEX => "Chapter {i}", LINK_TEXT => anchor text / data-title.

numberSource.description: Chapter number source: SEQUENTIAL=index+1, TITLE_REGEX=parse from title, ATTR=from numberAttr (falls back to TITLE_REGEX).

numberAttr.description: Attribute holding the chapter number when numberSource=ATTR (e.g. data-num).

numberRegex.description: Regex extracting the number from the title (TITLE_REGEX / ATTR fallback).

dateScope.description: ELEMENT=per-row date, DOCUMENT=page-level shared date node (e.g. "time").

noDate.description: uploadDate always 0L; skip date parsing entirely.

urlPrefixMangaDir.description: Resolve the chapter href against the manga URL's directory (Revolution).

lockedClass.description: Skip chapter rows carrying this class (e.g. "locked" premium rows).

mangaReaderListPage.description: Re-parameterized browse/search URL grammar (absorbs the getListPage overrides that only re-parameterize the base URL grammar). Absent => stock base grammar. Does not change list-parse markup. Only applies to engine="mangareader" HTML sources (JSON-API sources are a different engine).

listHost.description: Override host for LIST/SEARCH requests only (e.g. Komiku api.komiku.org).

browseSeparator.description: Separator between listUrl and the browse query.

orderParam.description: Query key carrying the sort token (e.g. Komiku "orderby").

orderKeys.description: SortOrder -> order token; values MAY be raw fragments like "orderby=title&order=ASC" to fold WordPress orderby/order pairs. default {ALPHABETICAL:title, ALPHABETICAL_DESC:titlereverse, NEWEST:latest, POPULARITY:popular, UPDATED:update}.

orderDefault.description: Order token used when the selected SortOrder is not in orderKeys (e.g. ThunderScans "new").

genreParam.description: Genre query param name (tags[], genre, genero, tag).

genreParamsIndexed.description: Dual/indexed genre params (e.g. Komiku ["genre","genre2"]); overrides genreParam, caps at list size.

statusValues.description: MangaState -> status token (per-source vocab + case). default {ONGOING:ongoing, FINISHED:completed, PAUSED:hiatus}.

typeValues.description: ContentType name -> type token (per-source vocab + case, e.g. Manga/Manhwa).

yearParam.description: Year filter param, emitted when filter.year != 0 (e.g. BacaKomik "yearx").

mode.description: PATH=/page/{n}/, QUERY=&page={n} at browse end, QUERY_FIRST=?page={n} emitted first.

inSearch.description: Also emit the page number on the search branch (Normoyun).

path.description: Search path (/search, /lista, ""); omitted => reuse the /page/{n}/?s= base.

singlePage.description: page>1 => empty list (single-page sources / paging guard).

mangaReaderPagesApi.description: JSON-API reader (used when pages.mode=api). Absorbs the reader-page JSON-API overrides.

domain.description: Separate API host; omitted => main domain (e.g. Westmanga apiDomain).

urlRegex.description: Regex over chapter.url; named groups feed urlTemplate.

imagesJsonPath.description: '|'-alternated dotted paths to the images[] array (e.g. "data.images|images", "data.data.images").

mangaReaderPages.description: Reader page-extraction tuning for getPageList (absorbs the getPages overrides). Absent/all-default => stock ts_reader-JSON-then-img-scrape behavior. Layers on top of the existing encodedSrc / netshield / cloudflare flags.

mode.description: auto=JSON-if-present else img-scrape (base, keeps fallback), images=force the scrape path even when a ts_reader script exists, json=force ts_reader JSON, api=JSON-API reader.

dedup.description: distinct() the resolved url list (Rokari, AlucardScans).

tolerateMissingSrc.description: Skip src-less instead of throwing (base requireSrc throws).

onErrorSrcAttr.description: Attributes whose onError src='...' supplies a fallback url (e.g. ["onError","onerror"]).

excludeUrlSubstrings.description: Drop urls containing any of these substrings (e.g. ["cover"]).

extraImgAttrs.description: Extra lazy-image attributes beyond the engine's src() list (e.g. ["abs:data-src"]).

scriptRegex.description: Regex (group 1 = the reader JSON) scanned over ALL <script> tags (MadaraScans).

jsonReplacements.description: [from,to] rewrites applied to the raw reader JSON string before parse (e.g. trailing-comma fix).

imageUrlReplacements.description: [from,to] rewrites applied to each image url (e.g. strip a stray backslash).

iframeReader.description: GET the first <iframe src> before parsing pages (CatharsisFantasy).

madaraConfig.description: config for engine="madara" (WordPress wp-manga theme). Every field is a scalar, enum, short list, or CSS selector. Omitted fields fall back to the engine's stock-Madara defaults. Engine constants NOT expressed here: the admin-ajax vars[] payload template, sort->param maps, multilingual status vocab, adult/status value maps, AES chapter-protector decrypt, and relative-date parser.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale for date parsing + title-casing (datePattern is interpreted with this). Defaults from top-level lang, else ROOT.

datePattern.description: SimpleDateFormat chapter-date pattern. Most-overridden field. e.g. "dd/MM/yyyy".

tagPrefix.description: URL segment before a genre slug.

listUrl.description: Path for the catalog/genre page; "" = root.

withoutAjax.description: Master switch: use GET ?s=&post_type=wp-manga pages instead of admin-ajax; also shrinks sort orders and disables tag exclusion.

postReq.description: Chapter-list fetch style: true=POST admin-ajax action=manga_get_chapters; false=POST {mangaUrl}/ajax/chapters/. Superseded by chapterFetch when that is present.

postDataReq.description: POST body prefix when postReq=true. Superseded by chapterFetch when that is present.

stylePage.description: Query suffix appended to chapter URLs to force the flat image list.

sortOrders.description: Which sort orders to expose (payload keys per order are engine constants).

selectors.description: CSS selectors; each optional, falls back to the engine default for stock Madara.

chapterTitle.description: Chapter-row title element. default a > p, else the anchor ownText. e.g. "a h4", ".mini-letters a", "h3". (getChapters/loadChapters absorb.)

date.description: Chapter date node. default span.chapter-release-date i

author.description: Details-page author box (stock wp-manga). Absorbs the getDetails author-extraction overrides; previously authors were always empty on details.

testAsync.description: Presence test: inline vs ajax-loaded chapters. default div.listing-chapters_wrap

images.description: Page-image extraction knobs that absorb most getPages overrides.

stripStyleParam.description: Strip ?style=list from chapter URL before fetching pages (HiperDex).

pageImgSelector.description: Override selector inside a page container (also the flat img selector when flatPages=true).

flatPages.description: Select in a single level from the bodyPage root (root.select(pageImgSelector ?: "img")) instead of the base two-level page-break -> img descent. Composes with bodyPage (use "body" for whole-doc) / pageImgSelector / imgAttrCandidates. false = unchanged base behavior.

staticTags.description: Optional pre-baked tag list for when live tag discovery fails.

tagDiscovery.description: Ordered tag-scrape recipes (absorbs the fetchAvailableTags overrides). Entries are concatenated + deduped on key. Empty => stock base tag roots (header ul.second-menu + div.genres_wrap ul.list-unstyled). If non-empty but yields zero tags, the engine falls back to the stock roots.

extraStatusMap.description: Optional per-source status synonyms extending the engine's multilingual dictionary. Value = MangaState.

chapterDateReplacements.description: Ordered raw-chapter-date substring rewrites applied before date parsing (absorbs 'just published' sentinels and month-abbrev fixes). Key = literal substring to find, value = replacement; applied case-sensitively in insertion order. Empty => no-op.

forwardCloudflareCookies.description: Engine forwards cf_clearance/__cf* cookies (covers the common CF-cookie override shape).

pathBrowse.description: Optional separate-search + path-based browse strategy (absorbs the getListPage overrides). null/absent => base admin-ajax / flat-merged-GET listing.

chapterFetch.description: Optional full chapter-list fetch descriptor (absorbs the loadChapters overrides incl. GET/paginated). null/absent => postReq/postDataReq behavior.

listItem.description: Optional alternate list-item markup for parseMangaList (absorbs the parseMangaList overrides). null/absent => stock parseMangaList.

mangareaderConfig.description: config for engine="mangareader" (MangaThemesia / MangaReader WordPress theme). Engine constants NOT expressed here: browse URL grammar, order/status/type maps, tag scraping, multilingual status dictionary, ts_reader.run JSON reader, resolveLink.

domains.description: Mirror domains (first = primary; the top-level `domain` is the default). e.g. manhwadesu.im, manhwadesu.cx, ...

searchPageSize.description: Items/page on the ?s= search endpoint (10-100). Paging metadata.

listUrl.description: Path of the browse/all-series page (also the tag-scrape page).

datePattern.description: SimpleDateFormat pattern for .chapterdate, interpreted with locale.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale for date parsing + toTitleCase. Defaults from top-level lang.

userAgent.description: Pinned User-Agent header (e.g. Komikcast pins a Chrome/91 UA).

sortOrders.description: availableSortOrders. default {UPDATED, POPULARITY, ALPHABETICAL, ALPHABETICAL_DESC, NEWEST}.

availableStates.description: Filter states to expose. Tri-state: omitted/null => stock default {ONGOING, FINISHED, PAUSED}; [] => expose none; subset => exactly that subset (unknown names skipped).

availableContentTypes.description: Filter content types to expose. Tri-state: omitted/null => stock default {MANGA, MANHWA, MANHUA, COMICS, NOVEL}; [] => expose none; subset => exactly that subset.

availableDemographics.description: Demographic facet to expose (absorbs KomikIndo's getFilterOptions demographics axis). omitted/null => not exposed. The demographic filter param itself rides the source's listPage grammar.

selectors.description: CSS selectors; each optional, falls back to the MangaThemesia default.

mangaList.description: Card container on list pages. default .postbody .listupd .bs .bsx

mangaListImg.description: Cover img inside a card. default img.ts-post-image

mangaListTitle.description: Title element inside a card. default div.tt

chapter.description: Chapter li rows. default #chapterlist > ul > li

page.description: Reader img selector on the non-JSON fallback path. default div#readerarea img

script.description: Where the encoded reader script lives (encodedSrc only). default div.wrapper script

testScript.description: Probe deciding is-JS-reader-page + the parsed script. default script:containsData(ts_reader)

encodedSrc.description: Reader images live in a base64 data:text/javascript <script src> blob (native decode path; no JS eval).

netshield.description: Enable the native NetShield anti-bot cookie solver. Engine-internal primitive; never source-supplied code.

cloudflare.description: Register/enable the Cloudflare interstitial solver toggle.

statusOverrides.description: Extra site-specific status synonyms, e.g. {"publishing":"ONGOING"}. Value = MangaState.

relativeDateWords.description: Optional relative-date vocabulary for sites like TuManhwas ("hace 3 días"). Maps unit words -> canonical unit (second|minute|hour|day|week|month|year).

chapters.description: Optional chapter-row parse tuning for getDetails (absorbs the getDetails chapter-row overrides). null/absent => stock MangaThemesia row parse.

listPage.description: Optional re-parameterized browse/search URL grammar (absorbs the getListPage overrides). null/absent => stock base grammar.

pages.description: Optional reader page-extraction tuning for getPageList (absorbs the getPages overrides). null/absent => stock ts_reader-JSON-then-scrape behavior.
